09a101435dfde82c7eb273998c930af4cf273a3d.text: {"findings": [{"clause_type": "License Grant", "quote": "Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, Marketing Affiliate may display Marketing Materials at its principal place(s) of business, or at the principal place(s) of its third party partners, together with a link from the Marketing Affiliate Web Site to Fquidata (and its partners) Web Site. Marketing Affiliate may not otherwise offer for sale, market, sell or distribute the Services of Equidata without express written permission.", "why": "Grants Marketing Affiliate a limited right to use Marketing Materials, which constitute IP, with specified scope and restrictions."}]}
